2603.23073.title: Can an LLM Detect Instances of Microservice Infrastructure Patterns?
2603.23073.paper_summary: Architectural patterns are frequently found in various software artifacts. The wide variety of patterns and their implementations makes detection challenging with current tools, especially since they often only support detecting patterns in artifacts written in a single language. Large Language Models (LLMs), trained on a diverse range of software artifacts and knowledge, might overcome the limitations of existing approaches. However, their true effectiveness and the factors influencing their performance have not yet been thoroughly examined. To better understand this, we developed MicroPAD. This tool utilizes GPT 5 nano to identify architectural patterns in software artifacts written in any language, based on natural-language pattern descriptions. We used MicroPAD to evaluate an LLM's ability to detect instances of architectural patterns, particularly infrastructure-related microservice patterns. To accomplish this, we selected a set of GitHub repositories and contacted their top contributors to create a new, human-annotated dataset of 190 repositories containing microservice architectural patterns. The results show that MicroPAD was capable of detecting pattern instances across multiple languages and artifact types. The detection performance varied across patterns (F1 scores ranging from 0.09 to 0.70), specifically in relation to their prevalence and the distinctiveness of the artifacts through which they manifest. We also found that patterns associated with recognizable, dominant artifacts were detected more reliably. Whether these findings generalize to other LLMs and tools is a promising direction for future research.
2603.23073.paper_summary_zh: 建築模式經常出現在各種軟體工件中。模式及其實現的多樣性使得目前的工具在檢測上面臨挑戰，特別是因為它們通常僅支持檢測用單一語言撰寫的工件中的模式。大型語言模型（LLMs）在多樣化的軟體工件和知識上進行訓練，可能克服現有方法的限制。然而，它們的真正有效性及影響其性能的因素尚未得到充分檢驗。為了更好地理解這一點，我們開發了MicroPAD。這個工具利用GPT 5 nano根據自然語言模式描述來識別用任何語言撰寫的軟體工件中的建築模式。我們使用MicroPAD評估LLM檢測建築模式實例的能力，特別是與基礎設施相關的微服務模式。為了實現這一目標，我們選擇了一組GitHub倉庫，並聯繫了其主要貢獻者，以創建一個包含190個微服務建築模式的人類標註數據集。結果顯示，MicroPAD能夠在多種語言和工件類型中檢測模式實例。檢測性能在不同模式之間有所變化（F1分數範圍從0.09到0.70），特別是與它們的普遍性和它們所表現的工件的獨特性有關。我們還發現，與可識別的主導工件相關的模式檢測得更為可靠。這些發現是否能推廣到其他LLM和工具，是未來研究的一個有前景的方向。
2603.23073.author: Carlos Eduardo Duarte et.al.
2603.23073.authors: Carlos Eduardo Duarte, Neil B. Harrison, Filipe Figueiredo Correia, Ademar Aguiar, Pavlína Gonçalves
